name: UBS SDIC China Securities Downstream Consumption&Services Indstry Idx (LOF)
summary: UBS SDIC China Securities Downstream Consumption&Services Indstry Idx (LOF) is an index fund focusing on the downstream consumption and services industry in China. The fund tracks a specific index related to this sector and is structured as a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF). It is managed by UBS SDIC Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between UBS and SDIC.
